assessment: 37B demonstrates cross-variant robustness: same extraction pipeline + same 8 domain rules produce an internally consistent BOM for a genuinely different kitchen geometry (23% larger run, +2 cabinets, +1 unique variant — 900mm sink base). No new pipeline code needed; only the sink-size spec (630 for 26A, 700 for 37B) is variant-dependent and comes from the per-page finish-spec table.
